eval_results.name: spec-compliance-check
eval_results.key_finding: Phase 1 review correctly checked spec compliance, identified interface contract deviations in login.py

eval_results.name: code-quality-check
eval_results.key_finding: Phase 2 detected SQL injection risk, hardcoded secret, and missing error handling; architecture assessed

eval_results.name: issue-categorization
eval_results.key_finding: SQL injection correctly categorized as Critical, poor naming as Minor, missing comments as Minor

eval_results.name: review-dispatch
eval_results.key_finding: code-reviewer agent dispatched correctly, Phase 1 initiated first, Phase 2 scheduled after Phase 1 completion

Critical.description: Security vulnerabilities, data loss risks, breaking spec

Important.description: Performance issues, missing error handling, architectural problems

Minor.description: Style issues, naming conventions, missing comments

strengths: Accurate spec compliance detection in Phase 1
Comprehensive security vulnerability detection in Phase 2 (SQL injection, hardcoded secrets)
Proper sequential phase dispatch (Phase 1 before Phase 2)
recommendations: Test review with large codebases (>50 files) in iteration 2
Add edge cases for conflicting spec versions
Test review dispatch with multiple concurrent tasks
